memory_candidates.content: The generate_claudemd() function in shared/extensions/merge.lua builds .claude/CLAUDE.md by concatenating a header template from extensions/core/templates/claudemd-header.md with content fragments from each loaded extension's merge-sources/claudemd.md or EXTENSION.md. The sync operation (sync.lua) uses a different code path (inject_section with section markers). Both paths must be kept consistent when modifying generation behavior.

active_projects.completion_summary: Fixed duplicate # Agent System heading in generated .claude/CLAUDE.md by removing it from merge-source, updated 2 broken @.claude/README.md references to @.claude/docs/README.md, and added @README.md to Context Imports.
active_projects.claudemd_suggestions: Removed duplicate heading from claudemd.md merge-source, fixed 2 broken @.claude/README.md references to @.claude/docs/README.md, added @README.md to Context Imports in both merge-source and generated CLAUDE.md

memory_candidates.content: The extension system's CLAUDE.md is generated via merge.lua:generate_claudemd() as a fully computed artifact -- NOT via section injection with markers. The inject_section()/remove_section() functions still exist in merge.lua but are unused for CLAUDE.md. The section_id field in manifest merge_targets.claudemd is vestigial. Both load and unload call generate_claudemd() after state update.

The extension loader supports 12 provides categories: agents, skills, commands, rules, context, scripts, hooks, data, docs, templates, systemd, root_files. The loader.lua file has 12 public functions corresponding to these. Unload dependency handling is a hard block (not a warning with confirm) -- the function returns false before reaching the confirmation dialog.
